calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Declaration And Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty Robert F. Cohen of Robert F. Cohen Attorney at Law, (800-492-2657) appearing for plaintiff.

Ruling - PLAINTIFF ROBERTO VILLEGAS's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery and For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is granted, sanctions awarded in the amount of $640.00 against defendant. Order signed in open court. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Robert Kane Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice And Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Labib M. Barance And Samer Majid Barance, As Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ROBERTO VILLEGAS' Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Labib M. Barance And Samer Majid Barance, As Judgment Debtors IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
